Title: OTP

Points: very hard

Description: 

Bob just found an unbreakable cipher called OTP!11!1! He is using it to encrypt all his messages:

Plaintext 1: "I remember the time I had to wait for the one-time password (OTP) to arrive on my phone, nervously refreshing the screen because I knew it would expire in seconds."

Ciphertext 1 (hex): 

Plaintext 2: ????

Ciphertext 2 (hex): ea36a29748367da05dd8f2ff29423c318268d7300efb95

Flag format: VOSSCTF{(plaintext 2)}

Flag: VOSSCTF{its_called_one_time_pad}

Author: Lukas Justin Borge
